privileged_info_summary: Verified that the requested NORAD IDs correspond perfectly to the real-world satellites: ISS (25544), SO-50 (27607), AO-91 (43017), AO-92 (43137), CAS-4A (42761), and CAS-4B (42759). Additionally, confirmed the geographical coordinates and altitudes for both White Sands Ground Terminal (32.5007 N, -106.6086 W, 1219m) and Wallops Flight Facility (37.9402 N, -75.4664 W, 12m) are correct based on public databases.
